articles.headline: Joe Lunardi's men's Bracketology March Madness watch guide
articles.description: Big stakes tonight for SEC (Texas), ACC (SMU) and Big Ten (Ohio State, Indiana) as Champ Week gets going.

images.name: Highlight: No. 5 Florida puts up 108 in win over Mississippi State
images.caption: Alex Condon powers the Gators with 26 points as Xaivian Lee puts up 19 and Rueben Chinyelu records a double-double of 11 points and 16 rebounds to defeat the Bulldogs, 108-74.

articles.headline: NCAA to require availability reports from tournament teams
articles.description: For the men's and women's NCAA tournaments, teams must submit initial availability reports the night before a game and provide updates two hours prior to the scheduled tipoff.

images.name: Miami (OH) HC Steele: We want MAC title, then advance in NCAA tournament
images.caption: Travis Steele tells Scott Van Pelt the next step after a 30-0 regular season is winning a MAC championship and advancing in the NCAA Tournament.

articles.headline: Steve Kerr, Doc Rivers join 'political interference' letter
articles.description: A number of prominent basketball coaches, including Steve Kerr and Doc Rivers, signed a public letter released Wednesday contending that political interference in universities threatens to undermine college athletics.

images.name: Steve Kerr [1296x1296]
images.credit: Photo by Noah Graham/NBAE via Getty Images

articles.headline: How every five-star men's college basketball commit fits at his new school
articles.description: Breaking down top class of 2026 commitments, including a third five-star recruit for BYU in three years.

images.name: Bruce Branch III [1296x729]
images.caption: Bruce Branch III, the former No. 2 prospect who reclassified up from the 2027 class, has committed to BYU, giving Kevin Young a third consecutive class featuring a five-star recruit.

images.name: Jordan Smith [1296x729]
images.caption: Jordan Smith is the second five-star recruit of the 2026 high school class to commit to Arkansas.

images.name: Cameron Williams commit fit
images.caption: A top-3 recruit in the class of 2026, Cameron Williams is headed to Durham to play for Jon Scheyer and the Duke Blue Devils.

images.name: Jason Crowe [1144x644]
images.caption: Jason Crowe, No. 4 recruit in the 2026 ESPN 100 player rankings, has committed to Missouri.

images.name: Babatunde Oladotun [1066x600]
images.caption: Babatunde Oladotun, the former 2027 No. 1 prospect who reclassified to the 2026 class and is ranked in the top-10, has announced his commitment to Maryland.

images.name: Dylan Mingo [1296x729]
images.caption: Premier class of 2026 guard Dylan Mingo has committed to North Carolina for the 2026-27 season.

images.name: Caleb Gaskins [1296x729]
images.caption: Caleb Gaskins is staying in-state next season to play for Miami and first-time head coach Jai Lucas.

images.name: Deron Rippey Jr. [1296x729]
images.caption: Deron Rippey Jr. has committed to Duke, giving the Blue Devils another top recruit.

images.name: Toni Bryant (commitment photo) [600x338]
images.caption: Toni Bryant, the No. 14 recruit in the class of 2026, has committed to Missouri, giving the Tigers two five-star prospects for the 2026-27 season.

images.name: Austin Goosby (Texas) [1296x729]
images.caption: Austin Goosby has committed to Sean Miller and Texas for the 2026-27 season.

images.name: Taylen Kinney [1296x729]
images.caption: Taylen Kinney is one of the best point guards in the boys' SC Next class of 2026, and recently committed to Kansas.
images.credit: Brian Rothmuller/Icon Sportswire via Getty Images
